## Public-boundary review

- [ ] No confidential material, internal correspondence, negotiations, personal data, credentials, private links or unlicensed raw datasets are included.
- [ ] Direct observations, official proxies and models remain separately classified.
- [ ] The change does not claim to represent Pixan Oy’s official position or establish valuation, financing, infringement, damages or investor interest.
- [ ] Marnet or other third-party material is minimized, attributed and reviewed for redistribution rights.

## Verification

- [ ] `python3 scripts/build_atlas.py`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_public.py`
- [ ] Generated data diff reviewed
- [ ] Relevant links checked
- [ ] Full atlas and lender/buyer view checked on desktop and mobile
